strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software engineering experience with deep expertise in the primary stack, including TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Recent and highly relevant experience in AI agent development, specifically with MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Exceptional background in software craftsmanship and testing, including TDD, CI/CD, and developing custom testing libraries.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are listed as core components of the primary stack.
Missing experience with Kotlin and Python, which were noted as required programming languages.
Maintains an active founder role (GISCollective) alongside full-time employment, which may raise questions regarding focus or bandwidth.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate for the Senior Fullstack Developer role. He brings over 15 years of software engineering experience, deeply aligning with the required TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. His recent work with AI agent infrastructure directly fulfills a niche requirement of the job description, and his extensive background in TDD, cloud platforms (AWS/K8s), and software craftsmanship demonstrates his ability to build reliable, scalable solutions. While he lacks explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python, his deep foundational knowledge across multiple languages and paradigms suggests he can easily adapt to these missing technologies.
